title: Markets Buoyed By Proposed Support Measures In China
section_path: Markets Buoyed By Proposed Support Measures In China
section_path_text: Markets Buoyed By Proposed Support Measures In China
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Sentiment was boosted by reports China is set to announced measures to support its economy. This helped offset a risk-off tone across broader markets amid a disappointing earnings season. Copper led the base metals sector higher after China said it would introduce measure to support economic growth.
